arts.ttl: Champions League | Juventus v Benfica: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Juventus prepare to host Benfica in their final Champions League group stage match, manager Thiago Motta faces a selection headache in the striker position. Recent loan signing Randal Kolo Muani, who made an immediate impact in Serie A against Napoli, is ineligible for European competition during the league phase. arts.sum: Juventus haven’t completely given up for Jean-Clair Todibo and, while they are keen on adding another center-back, they’ll do it only if they find the right reinforcement.
